name: Applesauce Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease well and flour a 9x9x2-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour with soda, spices, and salt. Add eggs, brown sugar, butter, and 1 cup hot applesauce. Mix on low speed until ingredients are combined.
3. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes longer, scraping the side of the bowl occasionally and using a rubber scraper to guide mixture into the beater.
4. Add remaining applesauce, dates, and pecans; mix for an additional minute.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 10 minutes in the pan.
